001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
006import java.time.Instant;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009import javax.inject.Inject;
010
011public class CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl implements CandlingObservationRepository {
012
013  private final CandlingObservationDao observationDao;
014
015  @Inject
016  CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl(CandlingObservationDao observationDao) {
017    this.observationDao = observationDao;
018  }
019
020  @Override
021  public LiveData<List<CandlingObservation>> getByEgg(long eggId) {
022    return observationDao.selectByEgg(eggId);
023  }
024
025  @Override
026  public LiveData<CandlingObservation> get(long id) {
027    return observationDao.select(id);
028  }
029
030  @Override
031  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(CandlingObservation observation) {
032    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
033      if (observation.getId() == 0L) {
034        observation.setTimestamp(Instant.now());
035        long id = observationDao.insert(observation);
036        observation.setId(id);
037        return id;
038      } else {
039        return observation.getId();
040      }
041    });
042  }
043}
